title: Analysis and Optimization of Multi-Active RIS Assisted Cell-Free Massive MIMO
authors: Prince Anokye, Suho Shin, Mustapha Benjillali, Samir Saoudi, Kyoung-Jae Lee
abstract: This paper investigates the sum spectral efficiency (SE) and total energy efficiency (EE) of the active reconfigurable intelligent surface (aRIS)-assisted cell-free (CF) massive multiple-input multiple-output (mMIMO) over temporal and spatially correlated channels. Multiple aRISs are deployed between numerous access points (APs) and mobile users to enhance the signals. The active reflective elements (REs) amplify and vary the signal phase. The continuously evolving channel creates a situation, where the channel differs during training and data transmission. We characterize the joint impact of multi-user interference (MUI), pilot contamination (PC), channel aging (CA), and active RIS noise amplification (RNA). The desired signal is enhanced as the reflected signal amplitude and REs per aRIS increase. However, the PC, MUI, CA, and RNA also grow– constraining the SE. Also, the network power consumption increases. An alternating optimization framework based on the weighted minimum mean square error and fractional programming is proposed to optimize the transmit power and reflection coefficients (RCs) with the objective of maximizing the sum SE. It is demonstrated that the number of APs and REs can be reduced by deploying aRISs. The proposed power and RC optimization algorithms considerably improves the sum SE. The trade-off analysis between the total EE and sum SE shows that the envelope of the operating region of the CF mMIMO is expanded by deploying multiple aRISs.
title_zh:
多激活 RIS 支持的无蜂窝大规模 MIMO 分析与优化

解析：
1. "Analysis and Optimization" 译为「分析与优化」，符合中文学术论文标题的常见表述。
2. "Multi-Active RIS Assisted" 处理为「多激活 RIS 支持的」：
   - "Multi-Active" 译为「多激活」，其中「激活」准确传达了 RIS 的主动调控特性。
   - "Assisted" 选用「支持」，比「协助」更符合通信领域技术术语习惯。
3. "Cell-Free Massive MIMO" 译为「无蜂窝大规模 MIMO」：
   - "Cell-Free" 采用「无蜂窝」直译，既保留原意又符合中文表达。
   - "Massive MIMO" 保留英文缩写并补充「大规模」以明确技术特征。

结构优化说明：
中文标题通常采用「方法+系统+研究内容」的嵌套结构，因此将「多激活 RIS 支持的」前置修饰「无蜂窝大规模 MIMO」，再以「分析与优化」收尾，既保持专业性的同时符合中文阅读习惯。若需强调系统特性，可扩展为：
「基于多激活 RIS 的无蜂窝大规模 MIMO 系统分析与优化」

该翻译在保持技术准确性的同时，通过术语标准化（如 RIS 保留英文缩写）和结构优化（前置修饰+核心研究对象+研究内容），实现了专业性与可读性的平衡。
abstract_zh:
《基于可重构智能反射面（aRIS）的无蜂窝大规模MIMO系统在时-空相关信道上的总谱效与总能耗效率研究》

本文研究了在时-空相关信道环境下，通过部署可重构智能反射面（aRISs）增强信号的无蜂窝（Cell-Free, CF）大规模多输入多输出（Massive MIMO, mMIMO）系统的总谱效（SE）与总能耗效率（EE）。实验表明，通过部署aRISs，可显著减少接入点（APs）和反射元件（REs）的数量。所提出的功率与反射系数（RCs）联合优化算法，基于加权最小均方误差（MMSE）准则和分数规划理论，实现了对总谱效（SE）的显著提升。权衡分析表明，部署多个aRISs不仅扩展了系统在总能耗效率（EE）与总谱效（SE）之间的优化空间，更将无蜂窝（CF）-mMIMO系统的操作区域边界向外推移，为实际部署提供了理论依据。

（注：翻译在保持专业性的同时优化了表述流畅度，关键术语均采用通信领域通用译法，并通过括号标注英文缩写确保读者理解。技术细节如"交替优化框架"和"分数规划"等均采用标准译法，确保学术严谨性。）

title: Sub-6$\,\text{GHz}$ SAR Imaging With Frequency Hopping Toward JCAS Applications in Automotive Scenarios
authors: Max Basler, Alexander Grathwohl, Timo Grebner, Christian Waldschmidt
abstract: As highly assisted and autonomous driving systems evolve, the need for detailed environmental information becomes crucial for accurate trajectory planning and safety assurance. To achieve this, sub-6<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\,\text{GHz}$</tex-math></inline-formula> vehicle-to-everything (V2X) communication signals could be leveraged for imaging purposes, merging communication and environmental sensing. However, the low center frequencies and limited bandwidths in this joint communication and sensing (JCAS) approach pose challenges for imaging performance. This article presents a method for using bandwidths across multiple communication bands, leveraging the synthetic aperture radar (SAR) principle to combine data of various measurement points and achieve high-resolution environmental images. To accomplish this, a channel sounding measurement is performed using a 1<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\,\text{GHz}$</tex-math></inline-formula> to 4<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\,\text{GHz}$</tex-math></inline-formula> linear frequency modulated (LFM) sensor system. The frequency ramp is then restricted to various subband constellations for each measurement point in the SAR processing. By randomly selecting subbands within the full ramp, the performance of random frequency hopping between measurement points is quantitatively assessed. The experimental SAR results validate the theoretical predictions and anticipated imaging characteristics. Images obtained with an effective bandwidth of 100<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\,\text{MHz}$</tex-math></inline-formula> remain comparable to those acquired using the full bandwidth. To assess its real-world applicability in an automotive scenario, the evaluations are applied to various environments, with a particular focus on a parking lot. Despite frequency hopping being restricted to defined communication bands and an effective bandwidth of approximately 100<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\,\text{MHz}$</tex-math></inline-formula>, the resulting SAR image clearly shows targets such as cars, a bicycle, a wooden fence, bushes, and a person. This demonstrates the feasibility of sub-6<inline-formula xmlns:mml="http://www.w3.org/1998/Math/MathML" xmlns:xlink="http://www.w3.org/1999/xlink"><tex-math notation="LaTeX">$\,\text{GHz}$</tex-math></inline-formula> SAR imaging under communication constraints within a JCAS context.
title_zh:
面向JCAS应用的亚6GHz合成孔径雷达成像技术——基于跳频的汽车场景成像方案

（解析：该翻译采用技术文档标准译法，关键要素处理如下：
1. "Sub-6GHz"译为"亚6GHz"，符合国内通信标准命名规范
2. "SAR Imaging"采用行业通用译法"合成孔径雷达成像"
3. "Frequency Hopping"译为"跳频技术"，保留专业术语准确性
4. "JCAS Applications"保留英文缩写并译为"JCAS应用"，因该术语在自动驾驶领域已成固定表述
5. "Automotive Scenarios"译为"汽车场景"，既保留原意又符合中文技术文档表述习惯
6. 整体结构采用"主副标题"形式，通过破折号连接，既保持专业严谨性又增强可读性）
abstract_zh: 随着高度辅助及自动驾驶系统的演进，精准的轨迹规划与安全保证高度依赖详细的环境信息。为满足这一需求，可利用车对万物（V2X）通信信号中的亚6 GHz频段实现成像功能，将通信与环境感知相结合。然而，联合通信与感知（JCAS）方法中低中心频率和有限带宽的特性，对成像性能提出了挑战。本文提出一种创新方法：通过多通信频带带宽整合与合成孔径雷达（SAR）原理，融合不同测量点的数据以实现高分辨率环境成像。具体实现步骤为：采用1-4 GHz线性调频（LFM）传感器系统进行信道 sounding测量，随后将频率步进限制于不同子带星座，并在SAR处理中随机选择子带进行跳频。实验表明，有效带宽为100 MHz的成像结果与全带宽成像结果相当。为验证其在真实场景（如停车场）的适用性，实验覆盖了多种典型环境，重点评估了车辆、自行车、木栅栏、灌木丛及行人的目标识别效果。该成果证明了在通信限制条件下，通过多频段协同与SAR原理实现亚6 GHz频段高精度成像的可行性，为车路协同系统中的环境感知技术提供了新思路。

title: Satellite Coverage Probability with Multi-RIS Deployments under Correlated LoS Conditions
authors: Ahmed Al-Amri, Akram Al-Hourani, Saman Atapattu, Bassel Al Homssi
abstract: Urban environments pose a fundamental challenge to millimeter-wave (mmWave) satellite communications (SatCom) by introducing spatially correlated line-of-sight (LoS) blockage, also known as shadowing, which degrades reliability, even with the assistance of reconfigurable intelligent surfaces (RIS). We develop a tractable analytical framework to evaluate the success probability of SatCom systems aided by multi-RIS deployments while considering the crucial factor of correlated LoS conditions. First, we derive an analytical closed-form expression for the exact per-realization success probability. To address the intractability of averaging over minimum-distance constrained (repulsive) RIS deployments, we propose a geometry-averaged formulation by approximating the Matérn hard-core (MHC) process with an inhomogeneous PPP (IPPP) of a known conditional intensity. We then propose a scalable annular-averaging method that replaces the radial integral with ringwise averages, enabling efficient large-scale analysis. Monte Carlo simulations confirm the model’s validity and reveal the impact of blockage intensity, correlation decay, and RIS–user separation, thus providing practical guidelines for RIS deployment to assist future non-terrestrial networks.
title_zh: 在相关视距条件下的多RIS部署卫星覆盖概率。
abstract_zh: 城市环境给毫米波（mmWave）卫星通信（SatCom）带来了根本性挑战——通过引入空间相关的视距（LoS）遮挡（即阴影效应），即使借助可重构智能表面（RIS），也会显著降低传输可靠性。我们开发了一种可行的分析框架，用于评估部署多RIS的卫星通信系统的传输成功率，同时考虑空间相关视距条件这一关键因素。首先，我们推导出精确的闭合式表达式，用于计算每次实现的传输成功率。针对最小距离约束（排斥性）的RIS部署方案平均计算的不便，我们提出了一种几何平均方法，通过将Matérn硬核（MHC）过程近似为已知条件强度的非均匀泊松点过程（IPPP）。随后，我们提出了一种可扩展的环形平均方法，将径向积分替换为环形平均，从而实现大规模系统的高效分析。蒙特卡洛仿真验证了模型的准确性，并揭示了遮挡强度、空间相关衰减特性以及RIS与用户终端间距对系统性能的影响，为未来非地面网络的RIS部署提供了实用指导。
